creator: danger@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

I didn't commit this because I have some ongoing work on this port and I 
was waiting for a new version to be released as there were a few 
stopping bugs in this version.

It has been released lately, unfortunately I have been on a rather long 
vacation and I just got back today. I will happily work on this soon. If 
you don't mind I will take over the responsibility again...

-- 
S pozdravom / Best regards
   Daniel Gerzo, FreeBSD committer
